title: Update: just remove Discord lobby notification entirely

log.context: Update: just remove Discord lobby notification entirely

Done. The Discord notification block has been removed from `POST /api/clungiverse/lobby/create` in `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/index.ts`. No button, no endpoint, no notification — lobby creation is now silent.
